ogTitle: Giles Corner vs Gillentown: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Giles Corner and Gillentown.
heading: Giles Corner vs Gillentown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Giles Corner, South Australia and Gillentown, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Giles Corner has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Gillentown (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Giles Corner or Gillentown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Giles Corner has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Gillentown scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Giles Corner scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Gillentown scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Giles Corner or Gillentown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Giles Corner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
